text: The kale Caesar is my standing order. Sweet potato fries are the only side that matters.
The shawarma bowl is always exactly what I want. Pickle game strong.
The margherita is the simplest thing on the menu and the best one. Family pies on the back patio.
Old-school Columbus institution. Bring company; bring patience for the wait.
Decent Sunday brunch close to home. Mimosas underrated.
Trivia Tuesdays are fun. Buffalo chicken wrap is dependable.
Solid Westerville pizza. The white pie with prosciutto is underrated.
Excellent oat-milk lattes and the staff remember regulars. Best work-from-cafe spot in the metro.
